textByHash.796f0fc62736deb593c2805c3860c8ad4a6bffc7: What would he have me do?
textByHash.4cc905448d68ef90d167886663da4c986f020109: I will keep it safe, no matter the cost. And you?
textByHash.282752fb4f9eed2d5114ce860df5ae0f57dfa325: Then I wish you luck, brother.
textByHash.0acf1f4adb41944409535274bd46be26faa087f0: On my honour as a justiciar, it will be done.
